generic.header: telocity: A tool for batch processing text with LLMs.

commandDescriptions.lu: Launch llama server using a configured preset.
commandDescriptions.tr: Translate a file chunk by chunk.
commandDescriptions.tf: Apply a transformation prompt to a file chunk by chunk.
commandDescriptions.os: Execute a single prompt with optional file context.
commandDescriptions.st: Strip or extract content between delimiters in a file.
commandDescriptions.mg: Merge multiple text files into a single file.
commandDescriptions.sp: Split a large file into smaller parts.
commandDescriptions.avg: Calculate average line length of a file.
commandDescriptions.tc: Count tokens in a file for a specific model.
commandDescriptions.rm: Remove progress files for completed or stuck jobs.

generic.footer: For more information on any command, use `telocity <command> --help`.

lu.description: Finds the best available local model file for a given preset and launches the llama.cpp server with the appropriate parameters.

flags.reason: Load the 'thinking' or 'reasoning' version of the model, if available.
flags.chat: Launch in chat mode for a single user (omits parallel processing arguments).
flags.quant: Force the use of a specific quantization level (e.g., 'q8', 'q6').

avg.description: Calculates the average number of characters (graphemes) and bytes per non-empty line in a file.

flags.edit: Open the user configuration file in the default editor.
flags.remove: Delete the user configuration files (prompts for confirmation).

rm.description:
Removes progress-tracking files. The command supports three modes:

- Positional (default): Removes the progress entry for a single source file, identified by <source_path>.
- All (--all): Removes all progress files currently tracked.
- Interactive (--interactive): Opens a menu that lists all progress files, allowing you to select specific ones to delete.

Use --force (-f) to skip confirmation prompts.

flags.interactive: Open an interactive menu to select which progress files to delete.

mg.description: Recursively finds and merges all files with a given extension from a source directory into a single file in the target directory (or current directory if not specified).

flags.extension: The file extension to look for (required).

os.description: Executes a single, one-shot prompt against an LLM, streaming the output to the terminal.

flags.file: Path to a file to be appended to the prompt as context.
flags.model: Override the model name from the preset.
flags.reason: Enable reasoning mode for presets that support it.

sp.description: Splits a large file into smaller parts based on a specified size, ensuring that lines are not broken.

flags.size: The maximum size of each part in megabytes (default: {{ .Size }}).

st.description: Strips or extracts content between specified delimiters from a file.

flags.params: Use start/end delimiters from a preset.
flags.extracttag: Extract content between delimiters instead of removing it.
flags.compress: Compress empty lines in the output.

tc.description: Counts the number of tokens in a file using a model-specific tokenizer.

flags.params: The model preset whose tokenizer to use (default: {{ .DefaultModel }}).
flags.downloadmodel: Download tokenizer files for a specific model (e.g., 'granite').

tf.description: Applies a custom transformation prompt to a file, processing it in chunks.

flags.batchsize: Number of chunks to process per batch (default: {{ .BatchSize }}).
flags.model: Override the model name from the preset.
flags.wait: Set a delay between API calls.
flags.reason: Enable reasoning mode for presets that support it.

tr.description: Translates a file from a source language to a target language, processing it in chunks.

flags.batchsize: Number of chunks to process per batch (default: {{ .BatchSize }}).
flags.context: Provide additional context for the translation.
flags.model: Override the model name from the preset.
flags.wait: Set a delay between API calls.
flags.reason: Enable reasoning mode for presets that support it.
